title: What an ancient Chinese dish can teach people about the ‘proper’ way to eat dishes
description: It was a familiar situation that I found myself in. I was one of two Singaporeans among half a dozen or more Malaysians, and predictably – and almost always unprovoked – the trashing of Singapore’s food began, especially its supposed unoriginality and blandness vis-a-vis Malaysian fare. I have learned to grin and bear it, recognising that these barbs are less about food than the complex emotions Malaysians harbour towards their southern cousins, which are shaped by history, resentment and a...

title: Ancient Wisdom Rekindled: Dr. Veerappa Moily Unveils 'Bharatiya Nyaya Shastra'
description: O.P. Jindal Global University, Sonipat, Haryana, hosted the launch of 'Bharatiya Nyaya Shastra: Reflections on Indian Jurisprudence & Perspective for Posterity' by Dr. M. Veerappa Moily. The esteemed author, a noted jurist and former Union Cabinet Minister for Law & Justice, emphasized the brilliance of ancient India's legal system over modern frameworks.

title: Extragalactic Archaeology tells the 'life story' of a whole galaxy
description: For the first time, astronomers claim they’ve found a way to reconstruct a galaxy’s entire ‘life story’ – from a single snapshot in time. Continue Reading Category: Astronomy , Science Tags: Astronomy , Spectroscopy , UCSC , Harvard-Smithsonian , Astrophysics

title: Why No Blood Falls in This Ancient Devi Temple
description: Some stories sound impossible until you hear them from generations who live them. In the hills of Kaimur lies a temple surrounded by mystery, faith, and a ritual that confuses outsiders the belief of “ahimsa bali,” a sacrifice where no blood is shed. Devotees say prayers are answered here, yet...

title: Bharatiya Nyaya Shastra - Ancient Indian Jurisprudence Treatise by Former Union Minister Dr. Veerappa Moily Launched at Jindal Global Law School
